creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to dewayne from comment #15)
Please do not expend any further effort on this PR.  I've just gotten ejabberd to build on b2.  I'll investigate the cause of the problem and advise within 24 hours.  (Its nearly 7pm, I'm GMT+11)  

I strongly suspect a compiler directive during the erlang build as the culprit (or, and less likely, a corrupt ccache?).
